name: Compress
description: Reduce JPEG, PNG, or WebP file size with a quality slider.

name: Resize
description: Set width, height, or scale percentage while locking aspect ratio.

name: Convert
description: Convert between JPG, PNG, and WebP.

name: Crop
description: Crop to a region with aspect-ratio presets.

name: Rotate & Flip
description: Rotate 90°, 180°, 270° or flip horizontally and vertically.

name: Strip Metadata
description: Remove EXIF, GPS, and other embedded metadata.

name: Watermark
description: Add a text watermark with adjustable opacity and position.

name: Merge / Collage
description: Stitch multiple images horizontally, vertically, or in a grid.

name: Favicon Pack
description: Generate favicon sizes and download as a ZIP.

name: Batch Process
description: Compress or resize many images at once and download a ZIP.
